narrative:
Enoch (precinct in Noble County) has 326 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 17.8 percentage points.
